question_html:
Choose the right option to fill in the gap in the following sentence.

“A number of _____ submitted the assignment”.
Rafah along with his friends _____ to a seminar today. Choose the appropriate verb from the options.
Which is not an antonym of the word 'eternal'?
He deals ____ stationary goods.
Each girl and each boy ____ paid the money. Choose the correct option.
Choose the correct spelling.
A synonym for ‘Foe’ is-
Not only Rezwana but also her sisters _____ so.
She is engaged _____ writing novels.
Synonym of the word ‘FLIMSY’ is-
The bread and breakfast _____ delicious.
I wish I _____ a child again.
Which one is the correct spelling?
Many a ______ tried to stop her.
Antonym of the word ‘ERUDITE’ is-
